generation.promptHintZh: TOEFL 2026 Listening pilot. Original campus conversation, announcement, or academic mini-talk, 110-220 words, with three 4-option comprehension questions. No real ETS text. Draft only until audio is produced and reviewed.

qualityRules: 100% original; use official TOEFL task style only as structure guidance.
Each set must include at least one detail question and one inference, purpose, or attitude question.
Questions must be answerable from the audio transcript alone.
Distractors must be semantically related but contradicted or unsupported by the passage.
Draft only until stable audio is generated and reviewed.
